tasks.subject: Task 1: Theme chrome presets + expo-blur
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the type presets and tab-bar surface colour the chrome needs, and install `expo-blur`, so later tasks reference tokens instead of hardcoding.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/theme/typography.ts` (append wordmark/tabTitle/barTitle/backLink/tabLabel/barMeta to textPresets)
- Modify: `mobile/theme/colors.ts` (add surface.tabBar)
- Modify: `mobile/package.json` (npx expo install expo-blur)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- textPresets exposes wordmark/tabTitle/barTitle/backLink/tabLabel/barMeta
- colors.surface.tabBar == rgba(12, 10, 27, 0.86)
- expo-blur in package.json
- just typecheck && just lint pass

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/theme/typography.ts", "mobile/theme/colors.ts", "mobile/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["textPresets exposes wordmark/tabTitle/barTitle/backLink/tabLabel/barMeta", "colors.surface.tabBar == rgba(12,10,27,0.86)", "expo-blur in package.json", "just typecheck && just lint pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TopBar shared chrome component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One TopBar component implementing all three top-bar kinds (home, tab, title), exported from the components barrel.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/components/TopBar.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/components/index.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- TopBar discriminated kind prop home/tab/title
- home/tab/title each render their specified chrome
- top inset from useSafeAreaInsets
- tokens only; just typecheck && just lint pass

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/TopBar.tsx", "mobile/components/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TopBar discriminated kind prop home/tab/title", "home/tab/title each render their specified chrome", "top inset from useSafeAreaInsets", "tokens only; typecheck + lint pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Tab navigator, four shells, and root restructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce the (tabs) group with a custom blurred tab bar and four placeholder shells, rewire the root layout to mount (tabs) headerless alongside parked night/manage, and remove the old index.tsx. Atomic — expo-router rejects two files mapping to /.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`, `index.tsx`, `history.tsx`, `club.tsx`, `settings.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/app/_layout.tsx`
- Delete: `mobile/app/index.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- four tabs render and switch, active ember + bold, inactive tertiary
- tab bar BlurView tinted surface.tabBar + hairline top + safe-area bottom
- Tonight home bar (gear->Settings); History/Club/Settings tab bars; placeholder lines
- night + manage still load as routes; app/index.tsx deleted
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`, then `just start` manual smoke.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx", "mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx", "mobile/app/(tabs)/history.tsx", "mobile/app/(tabs)/club.tsx", "mobile/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx", "mobile/app/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four tabs render and switch, active ember + bold", "tab bar BlurView tinted surface.tabBar + hairline top + safe-area bottom", "Tonight home bar (gear->Settings); History/Club/Settings tab bars; placeholder lines", "night + manage still load as routes; app/index.tsx deleted", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
